prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A single warm break of light falls across the lower lines of an old scroll while the upper lines and the surrounding stone sit in cool shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
An ancient Hebrew scroll lies spread across pale stone, its upper lines of script sunk in cold shadow and its final lower line caught in a warm break of light. The parchment is fibrous and worn, the ink old and cracked at the edges, and a single frayed thread hangs from the rolled wooden stave at the side. A deep shadow fills the space beyond. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the scroll spread across the stone, its lit lower line and shadowed upper lines.

Cut to mid framing — the lower portion of the scroll where the warm light rests on the final line.

Cut to close-up — the final illuminated line of Hebrew script.

Cut to macro detail — the cracked old ink along that line.

Cut to insert — the frayed thread hanging from the rolled wooden stave.

Cut to lower framing — the worn parchment edge against the pale stone.

Return to full composition — the whole scroll, lit line and shadow.

End hold on the final illuminated line.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
An ending that is also a promise, held in quiet light.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — scroll on stone, lit lower line, shadowed upper lines
Cut to mid framing — lower portion where warm light rests on the final line
Cut to close-up — the final illuminated line of Hebrew script
Cut to macro detail — the cracked old ink along that line
Cut to insert — the frayed thread on the rolled wooden stave
Cut to lower framing — worn parchment edge against pale stone
Return to full composition — whole scroll, lit line and shadow
End hold on the final illuminated line
